attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks on uphill finishes, willing to commit from far out when positioned outside GC contention. Capitalizes on GC teams' reluctance to chase when no threat to overall standings.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish pattern - only single race observation available showing independent long-distance effort.
terrain_preference: Uphill finales suit best; demonstrates ability to sustain power over extended solo efforts to the line.
vulnerability: Insufficient data - need observations where tactics failed or rider was marked/caught to establish vulnerabilities.
key_patterns: Only single race observation available - insufficient evidence to establish repeating tactical patterns
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2020 shows strong legs despite being 1h07m down, but no subsequent data to track progression
